name: Website Preview Pro
description: Instant website previews — compare, batch, QR codes, site info, download screenshots, pin favourites & more.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://image.thum.io https://quickchart.io; connect-src 'self' https://image.thum.io https://quickchart.io; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; frame-src 'none';
